name: Hubilo Virtual and Hybrid Event Platform API
what_it_does: Hubilo virtual and hybrid event platform REST API for enterprise marketing teams, event agencies, and conference organizers to create and manage virtual events, webinars, hybrid conferences, and networking experiences — enabling programmatic event creation, attendee registration management, session scheduling, sponsor management, and engagement analytics through Hubilo's event platform. Enables AI agents to manage event creation for virtual conference automation, handle attendee registration for participant management automation, access session scheduling for agenda configuration automation, retrieve engagement data for event performance analytics automation, manage networking for attendee matchmaking automation, handle sponsor booth for exhibitor management automation, access live stream for virtual stage management automation, retrieve Q&A and poll data for engagement reporting automation, manage badge for check-in automation, and integrate Hubilo with CRM, marketing automation, and LMS for end-to-end event lifecycle automation.
use_cases: Creating and managing virtual conferences and webinars for enterprise marketing event automation agents
Automating attendee registration and check-in workflows for event operations automation agents
Accessing event engagement analytics and session attendance data for ROI reporting automation agents
Integrating Hubilo with CRM and marketing automation for lead capture and follow-up automation agents
not_for: Physical-only in-person events without virtual component (Hubilo excels at virtual/hybrid)
Simple single-session webinars (Zoom Webinars or StreamYard are simpler for basic webinars)
Consumer ticketing platforms with public event discovery (Eventbrite handles consumer ticketing better)
best_when: An enterprise marketing team or event agency wanting AI agents to create and manage virtual or hybrid conferences, automate attendee workflows, and access engagement analytics through Hubilo's platform.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE CONTRACT REQUIRED FOR API: Hubilo API access requires Enterprise subscription; automated self-service API key assumption creates no API access; automated must have Enterprise contract and approved API integration. SESSION TYPES VARY: Hubilo supports multiple session types (live stream, pre-recorded, breakout, networking lounge); automated single session type assumption creates unsupported configuration; automated must specify correct session type for each event segment. ATTENDEE LIMIT BY PLAN: Hubilo event capacity varies by subscription tier; automated unlimited attendee assumption creates plan capacity errors; automated must verify attendee limit before event creation. NETWORKING MATCHING IS ALGORITHM-DRIVEN: Hubilo's networking feature uses algorithmic matchmaking; automated manual control of all matches assumption creates limited customization; automated should work within Hubilo's matching configuration parameters.

auth.notes: Hubilo uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA / Ahmedabad, India HQ. Founded 2015 by Vaibhav Jain and Mayank Agarwal. Products: Virtual events, hybrid events, webinars, networking, expo, awards, townhalls. SDKs: None public. Enterprise event platform. GDPR, CCPA compliant. Competes with Goldcast and Swapcard for enterprise event tech.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo/trial available; production requires Enterprise contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing based on attendee volume and features; custom contracts
pricing.notes: SF/Ahmedabad. Enterprise contract for API. GDPR, CCPA. Virtual/hybrid event platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; event and attendee APIs throttled per contract

known_agent_gotchas: ENTERPRISE CONTRACT REQUIRED: Hubilo API requires Enterprise subscription and approved integration; automated self-service assumption creates no API access; automated must obtain Enterprise contract before API development

SESSION TYPE MUST BE SPECIFIED: Hubilo supports multiple session types (live stream, pre-recorded, networking, breakout, expo); automated generic session creation creates type validation error; automated must specify correct session_type for each event segment

WEBHOOK FOR REAL-TIME EVENTS: Hubilo offers webhooks for registration, check-in, and engagement events; automated polling-only assumption creates high-latency event processing; automated should use webhooks for real-time attendee event signals

ATTENDEE CAPACITY IS PLAN-LIMITED: Hubilo event capacity is bounded by subscription tier; automated unlimited registration assumption creates capacity_exceeded error; automated must verify event capacity limit and implement waitlist handling

LIVE STREAM INTEGRATION IS EXTERNAL: Hubilo live streaming uses RTMP integration with external streaming providers; automated built-in streaming assumption creates missing RTMP configuration; automated must configure RTMP endpoint from streaming provider
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise event platform. GDPR, CCPA, SOC 2. API key + OAuth2. US/EU. Attendee and event data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise event platform. GDPR, CCPA. API key+OAuth2. US/EU. Attendee data.
